headline: American Express Targets Niche SMEs With New Interior Designer Business Card
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) has launched the ASID American Express Business Card for interior designers and small design firms. The product targets project based cash flow needs and aims to offer more flexible access to credit for independent design professionals. The card is issued through a fintech partnership, extending AmEx’s reach into specialized professional communities within the SME segment. For American Express, this move extends its long standing focus on commercial payments into...
